task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings of the 'DevOps Automation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the OpenProject interface with 'DevOps Automation' in the project header, and the 'Project settings' page is open.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Repositories' module for the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Modules' tab of the project settings, the checkbox next to 'Repositories' is checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Repository configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Repository' configuration tab or page within the project settings.
A dropdown, radio button, or selection menu for the repository type (SCM vendor) has 'Git' selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Git repository path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for the repository path or URL contains exactly '/var/lib/openproject/git/devops.git'.
A green success flash message (e.g., 'Successful update') is visible, or the screen displays the linked repository's commit history/file tree, confirming the integration is active.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web GUI to configure the repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenProject web interface, rather than a terminal executing API curl commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent entered the configuration into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The repository path and type are entered into the OpenProject settings form fields, not just typed into a text editor, search bar, or floating note.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) open in the screenshots used to alter the page text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project 'DevOps Automation' has the identifier 'devops-automation'. The expected repository type to select is 'Git'. The exact path to enter for the repository configuration is '/var/lib/openproject/git/devops.git'.
